server.h(3) Library Functions Manual server.h(3)

NAME

server.h

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct acds_client_data_t
Per-client connection data. struct migration_context_t
In-memory host migration context. struct acds_stats_t
Network statistics for both TCP and WebSocket connections. struct acds_server_t
Discovery server state.

Functions


asciichat_error_t acds_server_init (acds_server_t *server, const acds_config_t *config)
Initialize discovery server. asciichat_error_t acds_server_run (acds_server_t *server)
Run discovery server main loop. void acds_server_shutdown (acds_server_t *server)
Shutdown discovery server. void * acds_client_handler (void *arg)
Per-client connection handler (thread entry point). void * acds_websocket_client_handler (void *arg)
WebSocket client handler (thread entry point).

Function Documentation

void * acds_client_handler (void * arg)

Per-client connection handler (thread entry point). Processes ACIP packets from a connected client. Handles crypto handshake, then dispatches packets to session/signaling handlers.

Parameters

arg Pointer to client connection context

Returns

NULL (thread exit value)

Definition at line 938 of file src/discovery-service/server.c.

938                                      {
939   tcp_client_context_t *ctx = (tcp_client_context_t *)arg;
940   if (!ctx) {
941     log_error("Client handler: NULL context");
942     return NULL;
943   }
944 
945   acds_server_t *server = (acds_server_t *)ctx->user_data;
946   socket_t client_socket = ctx->client_socket;
947 
948   // Get client IP for logging
949   char client_ip[INET6_ADDRSTRLEN] = {0};
950   tcp_client_context_get_ip(ctx, client_ip, sizeof(client_ip));
951 
952   log_info("Client handler started for %s", client_ip);
953 
954   // Register client in TCP server registry with allocated client data
955   acds_client_data_t *client_data = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(acds_client_data_t), acds_client_data_t *);
956   if (!client_data) {
957     tcp_server_reject_client(client_socket, "Failed to allocate client data");
958     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
959     return NULL;
960   }
961   memset(client_data, 0, sizeof(*client_data));
962   client_data->joined_session = false;
963   client_data->handshake_complete = false;
964 
965   // Initialize crypto handshake context with client IP name
966   char crypto_name[96];
967   SAFE_SNPRINTF(crypto_name, sizeof(crypto_name), "crypto_discovery_client_%s", client_ip);
968   asciichat_error_t handshake_result = crypto_handshake_init(crypto_name, &client_data->handshake_ctx, true);
969   if (handshake_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
970     log_error("Failed to initialize crypto handshake for client %s", client_ip);
971     SAFE_FREE(client_data);
972     tcp_server_reject_client(client_socket, "Failed to initialize crypto handshake");
973     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
974     return NULL;
975   }
976 
977   // Set server identity keys for handshake
978   client_data->handshake_ctx.server_public_key.type = KEY_TYPE_ED25519;
979   client_data->handshake_ctx.server_private_key.type = KEY_TYPE_ED25519;
980   memcpy(client_data->handshake_ctx.server_public_key.key, server->identity_public, 32);
981   memcpy(client_data->handshake_ctx.server_private_key.key.ed25519, server->identity_secret, 64);
982 
983   if (tcp_server_add_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket, client_data) != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
984     SAFE_FREE(client_data);
985     tcp_server_reject_client(client_socket, "Failed to register client in registry");
986     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
987     return NULL;
988   }
989 
990   log_debug("Client %s registered (socket=%d, total=%zu)", client_ip, client_socket,
991             tcp_server_get_client_count(&server->tcp_server));
992 
993   // Create transport for handshake and subsequent client communication
994   acip_transport_t *transport = acip_tcp_transport_create("acds_tcp_client", client_socket, NULL);
995   if (!transport) {
996     log_error("Failed to create TCP transport for client %s", client_ip);
997     tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
998     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
999     return NULL;
1000   }
1001 
1002   // Perform crypto handshake (three-step process)
1003   log_debug("Performing crypto handshake with client %s", client_ip);
1004 
1005   // Step 0: Send crypto parameters
1006   handshake_result = crypto_handshake_server_send_parameters(&client_data->handshake_ctx, transport);
1007   if (handshake_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1008     log_warn("Crypto parameters send failed for client %s", client_ip);
1009     acip_transport_destroy(transport);
1010     tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
1011     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1012     return NULL;
1013   }
1014 
1015   // Step 1: Start handshake (send server key, receive client key)
1016   handshake_result = crypto_handshake_server_start(&client_data->handshake_ctx, transport);
1017   if (handshake_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1018     log_warn("Crypto handshake start failed for client %s", client_ip);
1019     acip_transport_destroy(transport);
1020     tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
1021     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1022     return NULL;
1023   }
1024 
1025   // Step 2: Authentication challenge (if required)
1026   {
1027     packet_type_t packet_type;
1028     uint8_t *payload = NULL;
1029     size_t payload_len = 0;
1030     int recv_result = receive_packet(client_socket, &packet_type, (void **)&payload, &payload_len);
1031     if (recv_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1032       log_warn("Failed to receive KEY_EXCHANGE_RESPONSE from client %s", client_ip);
1033       acip_transport_destroy(transport);
1034       tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
1035       SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1036       return NULL;
1037     }
1038     handshake_result =
1039         crypto_handshake_server_auth_challenge(&client_data->handshake_ctx, transport, packet_type, payload, payload_len);
1040     buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_len);
1041   }
1042   if (handshake_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1043     log_warn("Crypto handshake auth challenge failed for client %s", client_ip);
1044     acip_transport_destroy(transport);
1045     tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
1046     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1047     return NULL;
1048   }
1049 
1050   // Step 3: Complete handshake (verify and finalize) - skip if already complete
1051   if (client_data->handshake_ctx.state != CRYPTO_HANDSHAKE_READY) {
1052     packet_type_t packet_type = 0;
1053     uint8_t *payload = NULL;
1054     size_t payload_len = 0;
1055     int recv_result = receive_packet(client_socket, &packet_type, (void **)&payload, &payload_len);
1056     if (recv_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1057       log_warn("Failed to receive AUTH_RESPONSE from client %s", client_ip);
1058       acip_transport_destroy(transport);
1059       tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
1060       SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1061       return NULL;
1062     }
1063     handshake_result =
1064         crypto_handshake_server_complete(&client_data->handshake_ctx, transport, packet_type, payload, payload_len);
1065     buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_len);
1066     if (handshake_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1067       log_warn("Crypto handshake complete failed for client %s", client_ip);
1068       acip_transport_destroy(transport);
1069       tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
1070       SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1071       return NULL;
1072     }
1073   } else {
1074     log_debug("Crypto handshake already complete from auth_challenge step for client %s", client_ip);
1075   }
1076 
1077   client_data->handshake_complete = true;
1078   log_info("Crypto handshake complete for client %s", client_ip);
1079 
1080   // Store transport and registry ID in client data, and link back from transport
1081   client_data->transport = transport;
1082   client_data->registry_id = client_socket;
1083   transport->user_data = client_data;
1084 
1085   // Main packet processing loop
1086   while (atomic_load_bool(&server->tcp_server.running)) {
1087     packet_type_t packet_type;
1088     void *payload = NULL;
1089     size_t payload_size = 0;
1090 
1091     // Receive packet (blocking with system timeout)
1092     int result = receive_packet(client_socket, &packet_type, &payload, &payload_size);
1093 
1094     if (result >= 0) {
1095       log_info("★ ACDS_CLIENT_HANDLER: Received packet type=%u from %s, payload_size=%zu", packet_type, client_ip, payload_size);
1096 
1097       // Track network stats (TCP packets)
1098       // Packet size includes header (6 bytes: magic 4 + type 1 + length 2 + CRC 4)
1099       size_t total_packet_size = payload_size + 14;  // 4 (magic) + 1 (type) + 2 (length) + 4 (CRC) + 3 (client ID)
1100       atomic_fetch_add_u64(&server->stats.bytes_received, total_packet_size);
1101       atomic_fetch_add_u64(&server->stats.packets_received, 1);
1102     }
1103 
1104     if (result < 0) {
1105       // Check error context to distinguish timeout from actual disconnect
1106       asciichat_error_context_t err_ctx;
1107       bool has_context = HAS_ERRNO(&err_ctx);
1108 
1109       // Check if this is a timeout (non-fatal) or actual disconnect (fatal)
1110       asciichat_error_t error = GET_ERRNO();
1111       if (error == ERROR_NETWORK_TIMEOUT ||
1112           (error == ERROR_NETWORK && has_context && strstr(err_ctx.context_message, "timed out") != NULL)) {
1113         // Timeout waiting for next packet - this is normal, continue waiting
1114         log_debug("Client %s: receive timeout, continuing to wait for packets", client_ip);
1115         if (payload) {
1116           buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_size);
1117         }
1118         continue;
1119       }
1120 
1121       // Actual disconnect or fatal error
1122       log_info("Client %s disconnected", client_ip);
1123       if (payload) {
1124         buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_size);
1125       }
1126       break;
1127     }
1128 
1129     log_debug("Received packet type 0x%02X from %s, length=%zu", packet_type, client_ip, payload_size);
1130 
1131     // Multi-key session creation protocol: block non-PING/PONG/SESSION_CREATE messages
1132     if (client_data->in_multikey_session_create) {
1133       bool allowed =
1134           (packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE || packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_PING || packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_PONG);
1135 
1136       if (!allowed) {
1137         log_warn("Client %s sent packet type 0x%02X during multi-key session creation - only SESSION_CREATE/PING/PONG "
1138                  "allowed",
1139                  client_ip, packet_type);
1140 
1141         // Send error response using persistent transport
1142         acip_send_error(transport, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
1143                         "Only SESSION_CREATE/PING/PONG allowed during multi-key session creation");
1144 
1145         // Free payload and continue
1146         if (payload) {
1147           buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_size);
1148         }
1149         continue;
1150       }
1151     }
1152 
1153     // O(1) ACIP array-based dispatch
1154     // Set server context for callbacks
1155     acip_acds_callbacks_t callbacks = g_acds_callbacks;
1156     callbacks.app_ctx = server;
1157 
1158     asciichat_error_t dispatch_result =
1159         acip_handle_acds_packet(transport, packet_type, payload, payload_size, client_ip, &callbacks);
1160 
1161     if (dispatch_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1162       log_warn("ACIP handler failed for packet type 0x%02X from %s: %s", packet_type, client_ip,
1163                asciichat_error_string(dispatch_result));
1164     }
1165 
1166     // Free payload (allocated by receive_packet via buffer_pool_alloc)
1167     if (payload) {
1168       buffer_pool_free(NULL, payload, payload_size);
1169     }
1170 
1171     // Keep handler running after session_established
1172     // Handler continues to receive and relay WebRTC signaling packets (SDP, ICE)
1173     // Broadcasts don't go through this socket - they use tcp_server_foreach_client() to write directly
1174   }
1175 
1176   // Cleanup - handler always cleans up since it runs until connection closes
1177   tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, client_socket);
1178   log_debug("Client %s unregistered (total=%zu)", client_ip, tcp_server_get_client_count(&server->tcp_server));
1179 
1180   // Destroy transport before closing socket
1181   acip_transport_destroy(transport);
1182   socket_close(client_socket);
1183 
1184   SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1185 
1186   log_info("Client handler finished for %s", client_ip);
1187   return NULL;
1188 }

    tcp_client_context_t::client_socket,

    crypto_handshake_server_auth_challenge(),
    crypto_handshake_server_complete(),
    crypto_handshake_server_send_parameters(),
    crypto_handshake_server_start(), private_key_t::ed25519,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_NETWORK,
    ERROR_NETWORK_TIMEOUT, GET_ERRNO,
    acds_client_data_t::handshake_complete,
    acds_client_data_t::handshake_ctx, HAS_ERRNO,

Referenced by acds_server_init().






asciichat_error_t acds_server_init (acds_server_t *
  server, const acds_config_t * config)


Initialize discovery server. Loads or generates identity keys,
    opens database, creates session registry, and binds TCP socket.




Parameters


server Server structure to initialize


Config Module Configuration from command-line
  parsing


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 191 of file
    src/discovery-service/server.c.


191                                                                                        {
192   if (!server || !config) {
193     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "server or config is NULL");
194   }
195 
196   memset(server, 0, sizeof(*server));
197   memcpy(&server->config, config, sizeof(acds_config_t));
198 
199   // Initialize stats
200   atomic_store_u64(&server->stats.bytes_sent, 0);
201   atomic_store_u64(&server->stats.bytes_received, 0);
202   atomic_store_u64(&server->stats.packets_sent, 0);
203   atomic_store_u64(&server->stats.packets_received, 0);
204   server->stats.start_time = time(NULL);
205 
206   // Open database (SQLite as single source of truth)
207   asciichat_error_t result = database_init(config->database_path, &server->db);
208   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
209     return result;
210   }
211 
212   // Initialize rate limiter with SQLite backend
213   server->rate_limiter = rate_limiter_create_sqlite(NULL); // NULL = externally managed DB
214   if (!server->rate_limiter) {
215     database_close(server->db);
216     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to create rate limiter");
217   }
218 
219   // Set the database handle for the rate limiter
220   rate_limiter_set_sqlite_db(server->rate_limiter, server->db);
221 
222   // Configure TCP server
223   tcp_server_config_t tcp_config = {
224       .port = config->port,
225       .ipv4_address = (config->address[0] != '\0') ? config->address : NULL,
226       .ipv6_address = (config->address6[0] != '\0') ? config->address6 : NULL,
227       .bind_ipv4 = (config->address[0] != '\0') || (config->address[0] == '\0' && config->address6[0] == '\0'),
228       .bind_ipv6 = (config->address6[0] != '\0') || (config->address[0] == '\0' && config->address6[0] == '\0'),
229       .accept_timeout_sec = 1,
230       .client_handler = acds_client_handler,
231       .user_data = server,
232   };
233 
234   // Initialize TCP server
235   result = tcp_server_init(&server->tcp_server, &tcp_config);
236   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
237     rate_limiter_destroy(server->rate_limiter);
238     database_close(server->db);
239     return result;
240   }
241 
242   // Initialize background worker thread pool
243   atomic_store_bool(&server->shutdown, false);
244   server->worker_pool = thread_pool_create("acds_workers");
245   if (!server->worker_pool) {
246     log_warn("Failed to create worker thread pool");
247     tcp_server_destroy(&server->tcp_server);
248     rate_limiter_destroy(server->rate_limiter);
249     database_close(server->db);
250     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to create worker thread pool");
251   }
252 
253   // Spawn cleanup thread in worker pool
254   if (thread_pool_spawn(server->worker_pool, cleanup_thread_func, server, 0, "cleanup") != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
255     log_warn("Failed to spawn cleanup thread (continuing without cleanup)");
256   }
257 
258   log_info("Discovery server initialized successfully");
259   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
260 }

    acds_config_t::address, acds_config_t::address6,
    ASCIICHAT_OK, atomic_store_bool(), atomic_store_u64(),
    acds_stats_t::bytes_received, acds_stats_t::bytes_sent,
    acds_server_t::config, database_close(),
    database_init(), acds_config_t::database_path,
    acds_server_t::db, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_MEMORY,

    acds_stats_t::packets_sent, acds_config_t::port,

    rate_limiter_destroy(), rate_limiter_set_sqlite_db(),
    SET_ERRNO, acds_server_t::shutdown,
    acds_stats_t::start_time, acds_server_t::stats,

Referenced by acds_main().






asciichat_error_t acds_server_run (acds_server_t *
  server)


Run discovery server main loop. Accepts client connections and
    spawns handler threads. Blocks until shutdown signal received.




Parameters


server Initialized server structure


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code otherwise


Definition at line 262 of file
    src/discovery-service/server.c.


262                                                          {
263   if (!server) {
264     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "server is NULL");
265   }
266 
267   log_info("Discovery server accepting connections on port %d", server->config.port);
268 
269   // Delegate to TCP server abstraction
270   return tcp_server_run(&server->tcp_server);
271 }






References acds_server_t::config,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, log_info, acds_config_t::port,
    SET_ERRNO, acds_server_t::tcp_server, and
    tcp_server_run().


Referenced by acds_main().






void
  acds_server_shutdown (acds_server_t * server)


Shutdown discovery server. Closes listen socket, stops accepting
    connections, waits for handler threads to exit, closes database, and frees
    resources.




Parameters


server Server structure to clean up


Definition at line 273 of file
    src/discovery-service/server.c.


273                                                  {
274   if (!server) {
275     return;
276   }
277 
278   // Signal shutdown to worker threads
279   atomic_store_bool(&server->shutdown, true);
280 
281   // Shutdown TCP server (closes listen sockets, stops accept loop)
282   tcp_server_destroy(&server->tcp_server);
283 
284   // Wait for all client handler threads to exit
285   size_t remaining_clients;
286   int shutdown_attempts = 0;
287   const int max_shutdown_attempts = 100; // 10 seconds (100 * 100ms)
288 
289   while ((remaining_clients = tcp_server_get_client_count(&server->tcp_server)) > 0 &&
290          shutdown_attempts < max_shutdown_attempts) {
291     log_debug("Waiting for %zu client handler threads to exit (attempt %d/%d)", remaining_clients,
292               shutdown_attempts + 1, max_shutdown_attempts);
293     platform_sleep_ms(100);
294     shutdown_attempts++;
295   }
296 
297   if (remaining_clients > 0) {
298     log_warn("Server shutdown: %zu client handler threads still running after 10 seconds", remaining_clients);
299   } else if (shutdown_attempts > 0) {
300     log_debug("All client handler threads exited gracefully");
301   }
302 
303   // Stop and destroy worker thread pool (cleanup thread, etc.)
304   if (server->worker_pool) {
305     thread_pool_destroy(server->worker_pool);
306     server->worker_pool = NULL;
307     log_debug("Worker thread pool stopped");
308   }
309 
310   // Destroy rate limiter
311   if (server->rate_limiter) {
312     rate_limiter_destroy(server->rate_limiter);
313     server->rate_limiter = NULL;
314   }
315 
316   // Close database
317   if (server->db) {
318     database_close(server->db);
319     server->db = NULL;
320   }
321 
322   log_info("Server shutdown complete");
323 }






References atomic_store_bool(), database_close(),
    acds_server_t::db, log_debug, log_info,
    log_warn, platform_sleep_ms(),
    acds_server_t::rate_limiter, rate_limiter_destroy(),
    acds_server_t::shutdown, acds_server_t::tcp_server,
    tcp_server_destroy(), tcp_server_get_client_count(),
    thread_pool_destroy(), and acds_server_t::worker_pool.


Referenced by acds_main().






void
  * acds_websocket_client_handler (void * arg)


WebSocket client handler (thread entry point). Processes ACIP
    packets from a WebSocket client connection. Similar to TCP handler but uses
    transport-based APIs for crypto handshake.




Parameters


arg Pointer to
  websocket_client_context_t


Returns


NULL (thread exit value)


Definition at line 1194 of file
    src/discovery-service/server.c.


1194                                                {
1195   websocket_client_context_t *ctx = (websocket_client_context_t *)arg;
1196   if (!ctx) {
1197     log_error("WebSocket client handler: NULL context");
1198     return NULL;
1199   }
1200 
1201   acds_server_t *server = (acds_server_t *)ctx->user_data;
1202   acip_transport_t *transport = ctx->transport;
1203   char *client_ip = ctx->client_ip;
1204 
1205   log_info("WebSocket client handler started for %s", client_ip);
1206 
1207   // Allocate client_data
1208   acds_client_data_t *client_data = SAFE_CALLOC(1, sizeof(acds_client_data_t), acds_client_data_t *);
1209   if (!client_data) {
1210     log_error("Failed to allocate client data for WebSocket client %s", client_ip);
1211     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1212     return NULL;
1213   }
1214 
1215   client_data->transport = transport;
1216   client_data->joined_session = false;
1217   client_data->handshake_complete = false;
1218   transport->user_data = client_data;
1219 
1220   // Generate synthetic socket ID for tcp_server registry
1221   static _Atomic int g_ws_synthetic_id = INT_MAX;
1222   int synthetic_id = atomic_fetch_sub(&g_ws_synthetic_id, 1);
1223   client_data->registry_id = synthetic_id;
1224 
1225   // Register in tcp_server with synthetic ID (so callbacks can find client_data)
1226   if (tcp_server_add_client(&server->tcp_server, synthetic_id, client_data) != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1227     log_error("Failed to register WebSocket client %s in registry", client_ip);
1228     SAFE_FREE(client_data);
1229     SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1230     return NULL;
1231   }
1232 
1233   log_debug("WebSocket client %s registered (synthetic_id=%d, total=%zu)", client_ip, synthetic_id,
1234             tcp_server_get_client_count(&server->tcp_server));
1235 
1236   // Determine if client authentication is required by checking server configuration
1237   bool auth_required = server->config.require_client_identity;
1238   ctx->auth_required = auth_required;
1239 
1240   // Skip crypto handshake only for wss:// connections WITHOUT authentication requirement
1241   // For plain ws://, always do crypto handshake
1242   // For wss:// WITH auth requirement, always do crypto handshake
1243   bool skip_handshake = ctx->is_secure && !auth_required;
1244 
1245   if (skip_handshake) {
1246     client_data->handshake_complete = true;
1247     log_info("WebSocket connection from %s - skipping crypto handshake (TLS encryption used, no auth required)",
1248              client_ip);
1249   } else {
1250     log_info("WebSocket connection from %s - proceeding with crypto handshake%s", client_ip,
1251              auth_required ? " (client authentication required)" : "");
1252   }
1253 
1254   // Main packet processing loop using transport recv
1255   while (atomic_load_bool(&server->tcp_server.running)) {
1256     void *recv_buffer = NULL;
1257     size_t recv_len = 0;
1258     void *alloc_buffer = NULL;
1259 
1260     asciichat_error_t recv_result = acip_transport_recv(transport, &recv_buffer, &recv_len, &alloc_buffer);
1261     if (recv_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1262       // Check if this is a timeout or disconnect
1263       if (recv_result == ERROR_NETWORK_TIMEOUT) {
1264         log_debug("WebSocket client %s: receive timeout, continuing to wait for packets", client_ip);
1265         if (alloc_buffer) {
1266           buffer_pool_free(NULL, alloc_buffer, 0);
1267         }
1268         continue;
1269       }
1270 
1271       // Actual disconnect or fatal error
1272       log_info("WebSocket client %s disconnected", client_ip);
1273       if (alloc_buffer) {
1274         buffer_pool_free(NULL, alloc_buffer, 0);
1275       }
1276       break;
1277     }
1278 
1279     // Parse packet header from received data
1280     if (recv_len < sizeof(packet_header_t)) {
1281       log_warn("WebSocket client %s: received packet too small (%zu bytes)", client_ip, recv_len);
1282       if (alloc_buffer) {
1283         buffer_pool_free(NULL, alloc_buffer, 0);
1284       }
1285       continue;
1286     }
1287 
1288     const packet_header_t *header = (const packet_header_t *)recv_buffer;
1289     packet_type_t packet_type = (packet_type_t)NET_TO_HOST_U16(header->type);
1290     size_t payload_size = NET_TO_HOST_U32(header->length);
1291     const void *payload = (const uint8_t *)recv_buffer + sizeof(packet_header_t);
1292 
1293     // Validate payload size
1294     if (recv_len < sizeof(packet_header_t) + payload_size) {
1295       log_warn("WebSocket client %s: packet size mismatch (expected %zu, got %zu)", client_ip,
1296                sizeof(packet_header_t) + payload_size, recv_len);
1297       if (alloc_buffer) {
1298         buffer_pool_free(NULL, alloc_buffer, 0);
1299       }
1300       continue;
1301     }
1302 
1303     log_debug("Received packet type 0x%02X from WebSocket client %s, length=%zu", packet_type, client_ip, payload_size);
1304 
1305     // Multi-key session creation protocol: block non-PING/PONG/SESSION_CREATE messages
1306     if (client_data->in_multikey_session_create) {
1307       bool allowed =
1308           (packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE || packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_PING || packet_type == PACKET_TYPE_PONG);
1309 
1310       if (!allowed) {
1311         log_warn("WebSocket client %s sent packet type 0x%02X during multi-key session creation - only "
1312                  "SESSION_CREATE/PING/PONG allowed",
1313                  client_ip, packet_type);
1314         acip_send_error(transport, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM,
1315                         "Only SESSION_CREATE/PING/PONG allowed during multi-key session creation");
1316         if (alloc_buffer) {
1317           buffer_pool_free(NULL, alloc_buffer, 0);
1318         }
1319         continue;
1320       }
1321     }
1322 
1323     // O(1) ACIP array-based dispatch
1324     acip_acds_callbacks_t callbacks = g_acds_callbacks;
1325     callbacks.app_ctx = server;
1326 
1327     asciichat_error_t dispatch_result =
1328         acip_handle_acds_packet(transport, packet_type, payload, payload_size, client_ip, &callbacks);
1329 
1330     if (dispatch_result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
1331       log_warn("ACIP handler failed for packet type 0x%02X from WebSocket client %s: %s", packet_type, client_ip,
1332                asciichat_error_string(dispatch_result));
1333     }
1334 
1335     if (alloc_buffer) {
1336       buffer_pool_free(NULL, alloc_buffer, 0);
1337     }
1338   }
1339 
1340   // Cleanup
1341   tcp_server_remove_client(&server->tcp_server, synthetic_id);
1342   log_debug("WebSocket client %s unregistered (total=%zu)", client_ip, tcp_server_get_client_count(&server->tcp_server));
1343 
1344   // Transport is owned by WebSocket server, don't destroy it here
1345 
1346   log_info("WebSocket client handler finished for %s", client_ip);
1347 
1348   SAFE_FREE(ctx);
1349 
1350   return NULL;
1351 }






References acip_handle_acds_packet(),
    acip_send_error(), acip_acds_callbacks_t::app_ctx,
    ASCIICHAT_OK, atomic_load_bool(),
    websocket_client_context_t::auth_required, buffer_pool_free(),
    websocket_client_context_t::client_ip, acds_server_t::config,
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ERROR_NETWORK_TIMEOUT,
    acds_client_data_t::handshake_complete,
    acds_client_data_t::in_multikey_session_create,
    websocket_client_context_t::is_secure,
    acds_client_data_t::joined_session, packet_header_t::length,
    log_debug, log_error, log_info, log_warn,
    NET_TO_HOST_U16, NET_TO_HOST_U32,
    PACKET_TYPE_ACIP_SESSION_CREATE, PACKET_TYPE_PING,
    PACKET_TYPE_PONG, acds_client_data_t::registry_id,
    acds_config_t::require_client_identity, tcp_server::running,
    SAFE_CALLOC, SAFE_FREE, acds_server_t::tcp_server,
    tcp_server_add_client(), tcp_server_get_client_count(),
    tcp_server_remove_client(), acds_client_data_t::transport,
    websocket_client_context_t::transport, packet_header_t::type,
    acip_transport::user_data, and
    websocket_client_context_t::user_data.


Referenced by acds_main().

    Version 0.9.19
    ascii-chat
